title: ✨ The Update Hub is Here! 🚀
message: We've crafted a beautiful new way to keep you perfectly in sync with our latest SafeKeep features and security patches.
points: 🔔 In-App Updater: Get instantly notified about fresh features directly when you open your vault.
📖 Interactive Changelogs: Discover exactly what's new the moment you update.
⚡ Faster Launches: We removed startup interruptions so you get to your secure files faster.
🔒 Security Boost: Under-the-hood encryption tweaks for an even faster, zero-lag experience.
